titleStmt.title: SII 17.299: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 299. (A.R. No. 271 of 1904.) YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north and west bases of the Parāśarēśvara temple.
This inscription mentions a fight between Vīra Nārasiṅgadēva alias Yādavarāya and Kāḍavarāya at Uratti.

It records the gift of land, irrigated by Nārāyaṇaputtēri excavated for the merit of Nārāyaṇa-ppiḷḷai, and taxes (śilvari) including kaḍamai, āyam, poṟkaḍamai, pāḍikāval, veṭṭi, sārikai-koḷvari, for the midnight and morning services to god Tippalādīśvaramuḍaiya Nāyaṉār in Tiruchchukaṉūr, in Tirukkuḍavūr-nāḍu in Tiruvēṅgaḍa-kkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Pokkaṉ alias Pāṇḍiyataraiyar, son of Uḍaiyār, the son of Parasamayakōḷariyāṇḍār for the merit of his nephew (marumagaṉ) Nārāyaṇappiḷḷai who attacked Kāḍavarāya and got killed in the fight mentioned above. The name of the temple accountant is given as Perumuḷaiyūruḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Siṅgappiḷḷai alias Vāgīśa-pperumāḷ (vide No. 302.)

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tiruveṅkaṭak koṭṭattut tirukkuṭavūr nāṭṭut tiruccukaṉūr Uṭaiyār tippa lātiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ikkoyil māṭāpattiyañ ceyyum pācamayako
ḷariyāṇṭār makaṉ Uṭaiyār makaṉ pokkaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyataraiyar tam marumakaṉ piḷḷaiyār viranāraciṅkatevarāṉa yātavarāyar kāṭavarāyaruṭaṉ Urattiyiṟ ceyta pūcalil kāṭavarāyarai muṭṭik kutti I piḷḷaiyār muṉ paṭṭa nārāyaṇappiḷḷaikku naṉṟāka Immaṇṭala
ttu Ikkoṭṭattuc cilaināṭṭu maṅkalattil poṉṉaṟa Iṭṭu maṇṇaṟakkoṇṭu tūṇi nilamāka muṉṉāḷiṟ payireṟi yaṟiyāta vaṉkāṭṭile Ivaṉ perā livar kalluvitta nārāyaṇapput terikiḻt tiruttu nilam Āṟu paṭṭiyum kaṭamaiyumāyamum poṟkaṭamaiyum pāṭikāval veṭṭi carikai ce[�]ṉ vari Uḷ
ḷiṭṭa Eppeṟpaṭṭa cilvarikaḷum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkut tiruvattayāmattukkum tiruveḻuccipaṭikkum Uṭalākac cantirātittavarai celvatāka viṭṭom Ippaṭikkuk kalveṭṭik koḷvateṉṟu piḷḷaiyār yātavarāyar kuṭutta tirumukappaṭikku Ikkoyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇaṉ Uṭaiya paṭṭar maka
ṉkiṭṭa paṭṭarum Uḻiya paṭṭar tevappiḷḷaiyun tirumulapaṭṭar nāyakap piḷḷaiyum Ivaṉ tampi vaṭukappiḷḷaiyum Immūṉṟukuṭiyiluḷḷomum Iṉṉilam Upaiyamākak kaikkoṇṭu tiruva ttayāmamun tiruveḻuccippaṭiyuñ celutta kaṭavomākavum celuttumiṭattu tiruvattayāma ttukku nā
ḷ Oṉṟukkup pāti nāḷ ceṣam Uṭpaṭa Irutūm pirunāḻi Ariciyum tiruyeḻuccikku kku I vākat tiruveḻucci Oṉṟukkum tiru ppāṉa tūmpu Ariciyu ney nāḻiyun tayir Oru tūmpum Uppu nāḻiyuṅ kaṟiyamutuñ celuttak kaṭavomākavu
m Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai celutta Upayaṅ kaikkoṇṭom Ikkoyiṟ civapirāmaṇarom Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyiṟ koyiṟ kaṇakkuk kāṇi Uṭaiya perumuḷaiyūruṭaiyāṉ tiruc ciṟṟam palamuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkappiḷḷaiyāṉa vākicapperumāḷeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivom Ivvūr mahācabhaiyom Itu paṉmāheśurar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.299 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
